questionHtml: Calculate, for the merry-go-round after one revolution, the angular momentum.
markschemeHtml:
«L = Iω = 450 × 1.66»

= 750 «kgm2 rads–1»

 

Accept BCA, values in the range: 710 to 780.

[1 mark]

meta.title: Calculate, for the merry-go-round after one revolution, the angular momentum.
